title: Direction labels for palace-stem self-transformations

positions.summary: A transformation triggered by the target palace's own stem is outward (↓, 离心); one triggered by the opposite palace stem is inward (↑, 向心).
Expose only the origin palace, stem, target palace, star, and transformation without assigning inward/outward symbols.

sources.locator: 卷二十干四化表不定义现代向心、离心符号

default_policy.rationale: It reproduces the supplied comparison convention while retaining origin and target facts so consumers can ignore the labels.

user_disclosure: The star-to-transformation mapping follows the selected classical table; ↓/↑ and 离心/向心 are declared project direction labels.
